source: Te Whatu Ora Capitation Rates s.10 — Zero Fees for Under-6s
notes: Per-patient capitation. Paid on enrolled patients aged 0-5 — the 5-14 band rates are minimal supplementary amounts (just age-5 children).
Mutually exclusive with the U14 scheme (s.11). The 0-4 band rates are identical between the two schemes; they differ at the 5-14 band, where U14 is ~$93/yr and U6 is ~$4/yr.
Both Hillside and Blockhouse Bay reconcile to U14, not U6 — most modern practices appear to be on U14.
